reference: Is it the kneecap that is popping out? That is a very serious issue. It is called habitual dislocation of the patella. It may be due to various causes such as laxity, high-riding patella, or femoral condyle dysplasia, and treatment depends upon the underlying cause. Do you have any X-rays or magnetic resonance imaging? Where do you live?
text: Is this the new cast that is popping up? Odd is a very serious issue. It is called habitual dislocation of the disc, that moves into various problems such as back, high-riding hip, and femoral condyles dislocation. The treatment depends upon the underlying cause. Do you have any X-rays in my head? It doesn't look anything. What do you do?
